sourcePrompt: A French-colonial villa of 1930s Vietnam, an elegant two-story house roughly twelve meters wide. Whitewashed walls with tall louvered shutters on every window, a columned veranda wrapping the ground floor with a balustraded balcony above, arched openings at the entrance, and a red clay-tile hipped roof with wide eaves. Whitewash, dark green shutters and red tile - faded tropical grandeur.
